PARTY-LOOT.give-no-recipients: No other player characters are available to receive this item.
PARTY-LOOT.give-no-gm: A GM must be logged in to transfer items.
PARTY-LOOT.give-invalid-quantity: Enter a valid quantity to give.
PARTY-LOOT.give-missing-data: The item transfer could not be completed because the source item or actor was not found.
PARTY-LOOT.give-no-permission: You do not have permission to give that item.
PARTY-LOOT.give-invalid-recipient: Choose another player character to receive the item.
PARTY-LOOT.give-invalid-item: That item type cannot be given.
PARTY-LOOT.inventory-list-hint: Items marked as Party Loot on character sheets
PARTY-LOOT.no-shared-items: No character items have been marked as Party Loot yet.
PARTY-LOOT.scratchpad-hint: Stage loose loot here before giving it to characters
PARTY-LOOT.no-scratchpad-items: Drop loot here or add a new entry.
PARTY-LOOT.distribute-party-item-dialog-hint: Assign up to {count}x {item}. Leave a character at 0 to skip them.
PARTY-LOOT.distribute-party-item-invalid-quantity: Assign a total quantity from {min} to {max}.
PARTY-LOOT.setting-delete-actor-item-on-drag-hint: If this is selected, items dragged onto the party inventory scratchpad from a character's inventory are deleted from the character
